mapper.insert: INSERT INTO diary_reactions (diary_id, user_id, type) VALUES (#{diaryId}, #{userId}, #{type}) ON CONFLICT (diary_id, user_id, type) DO NOTHING
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM diary_reactions WHERE diary_id = #{diaryId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE diaries SET reaction_count = reaction_count + 1 WHERE id = #{diaryId}
UPDATE diaries SET reaction_count = reaction_count - 1 WHERE id = #{diaryId} AND reaction_count > 0
mapper.select: SELECT count(*)::int FROM diary_reactions WHERE diary_id = #{diaryId}
